issues.description: DSL is missing the second part of the effect: 'at the end of this turn, up to 1 rested Character with 3 or more DON!! cards given will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.' This is a conditional delayed effect that should be a separate effect entry with trigger 'EndOfTurn' and a condition checking DON count >= 3.
GiveDon action missing 'toOpponentCharacter' boolean flag or equivalent targeting specification to clarify the DON cards are given to opponent's Character, not your own.
Target should specify 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with count 1 (up to 1 opponent Character receives the DON cards), not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' alone.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Blocker]
[On Play] Give up to 2 DON!! cards from your opponent's cost area to 1 of your opponent's Characters. Then, at the end of this turn, up to 1 rested Character with 3 or more DON!! cards given will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.
